input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.10.4.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.10.4.4
            TITLE: holes and openings for airflow:

            CONTENT:
            rule F.10.4.4: Holes and Openings for airflow:
F.10.4.4 Holes and Openings for airflow: 
a. Must be round.  Slots are prohibited 
b. Should be maximum 10 mm diameter
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 51 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023 
c. Must not have line of sight to the driver, with the Firewall installed or removed

final_answer: rule F.10.4.4: Holes and Openings for airflow: F.10.4.4 Holes and Openings for airflow: a. Must be round. Slots are prohibited b. Should be maximum 10 mm diameter c. Must not have line of sight to the driver, with the Firewall installed or removed
